summary: Decompiled three small, straightforward functions: two Kirby animation callbacks in ftKb_Init.c and one Big Blue Route stage helper in grbigblueroute.c. The PR also tightened the prototype for grBigBlueRoute_8020DED4 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void grBigBlueRoute_8020DED4(Point3d*), enabling the newly matched caller to pass a stack Point3d produced from a fighter/object position helper.
what_changed: Replaced the stub for ftKb_SpecialS_Anim with a simple animation-end callback: if ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining(gobj) returns 0, it calls ft_8008A2BC(gobj).

Replaced the stub for ftKb_YsSpecialAirNCapture2_Anim with logic that gets the Fighter via GET_FIGHTER(gobj), animates Kirby's copied Yoshi hat JObj with HSD_JObjAnimAll(fp->fv.kb.hat.jobj), and enters fall with ftCo_Fall_Enter(gobj) when the animation has no frames remaining.
Added ft/ftlib.h and cm/camera.h includes to grbigblueroute.c to support the newly decompiled stage function.

Replaced the stub for grBigBlueRoute_8020B920 with a function that obtains an HSD_GObj from Ground_801C57A4, checks for NULL, computes a Point3d with ftLib_80086644, passes it to grBigBlueRoute_8020DED4, then calls Camera_8002F3AC.
Updated grBigBlueRoute_8020DED4's header declaration from an unknown return/parameter placeholder to void grBigBlueRoute_8020DED4(Point3d*).
smart_moves: Targeted small animation callback functions where the control flow is idiomatic and low-risk: frame countdown check followed by a state transition/helper call.
Preserved the animation of Kirby's hat JObj in ftKb_YsSpecialAirNCapture2_Anim before performing the normal animation-complete fall transition, matching common copied-ability behavior patterns.
Used a stack Point3d in grBigBlueRoute_8020B920 and only invoked the downstream route/camera behavior after confirming Ground_801C57A4 returned a non-NULL GObj.

Converted grBigBlueRoute_8020DED4's prototype only as far as the new callsite proves: return type void and a single Point3d* argument, rather than leaving it as UNK_PARAMS or over-inferencing additional details.
Added direct subsystem includes for newly referenced functions instead of relying on incidental declarations.
decomp_lessons: Many animation callbacks can be matched by recognizing the recurring pattern: call ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining, compare to 0, then call the appropriate state-change or cleanup function.
Kirby copied-ability animation code may need to animate fp->fv.kb.hat.jobj explicitly with HSD_JObjAnimAll in addition to checking the fighter animation state.
When a decompiled caller reveals an unknown callee signature, update the header prototype narrowly and evidence-first; here the callsite justifies void grBigBlueRoute_8020DED4(Point3d*).
Stage helper functions may bridge ground/object lookup, fighter-library position extraction, stage-specific route logic, and camera updates in a compact sequence.
NULL guards around HSD_GObj returns are important for matching and for preserving original safety/control flow.
naming_conventions: Kirby fighter functions use the ftKb_ prefix and encode special-move/state names such as ftKb_SpecialS_Anim and ftKb_YsSpecialAirNCapture2_Anim.
Common fighter state helper names use subsystem prefixes such as ftAnim_, ftCo_, and ftLib_.
Stage functions for Big Blue Route retain address-based names with the grBigBlueRoute_ prefix, such as grBigBlueRoute_8020B920 and grBigBlueRoute_8020DED4.
Unknown stage prototypes in headers use UNK_RET and UNK_PARAMS until a callsite provides enough evidence for a real signature.
Local decomp temporaries in the diff retain compiler-style names such as sp8 and temp_r3 where more semantic names were not established.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use exact zero comparison against ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining(gobj) for end-of-animation branches.
For simple animation callbacks, keep the branch body minimal and avoid introducing unnecessary temporaries when the original flow is just a helper call on animation completion.
For object-position helper patterns, declare a stack Point3d, pass its address to the position-filling function, then pass the same address to the consumer function.
Place the HSD_GObj NULL check before any use of the returned object to preserve the likely original branch structure.
Include the headers that define externally referenced helpers so the compiler sees precise prototypes during matching.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the supplied PR context.
The PR had one issue comment according to the counts, but no comment body was included in the excerpt, so no reviewer intent or requested changes can be extracted.
follow_up_queries: Find other ftKb_*_Anim stubs that only need ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining plus a state transition.
Search for additional Kirby copied-ability callbacks that animate fp->fv.kb.hat.jobj with HSD_JObjAnimAll.
Audit grBigBlueRoute unknown prototypes for callsites that can replace UNK_RET or UNK_PARAMS with concrete types.
Look for other stage functions that call Ground_801C57A4, ftLib_80086644, and Camera_8002F3AC in sequence.
